room.caption: [CCityNorthWestHouseA] It's a split party tutorial.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(9)
if global.gameProgress=1030 {global.gameProgress=1040} global.partySplit=1
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh5MainA) roomControl=instance_create(0,0,oEvKeyControl) roomControl.progCheck=1060
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(3) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: stringToShow="Both characters must be within the field to move on." signSize=1
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=2 xDir=2 yDir=0 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=4
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=2 xDir=0 yDir=2 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=4
